---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Master Project

<!-- badges: start -->

<!-- badges: end -->

This is the repository for my master thesis finishing in June 2027.

Here you can find all my code for the project.

![](figs/cod uwu.jfif)
